title: 1.1: Changes the `Logger` field type in `TestPreInitState` struct within `lib/test_state.go` from `*logrus.Logger` to `logrus.FieldLogger`
1.2: Changes the `Logger` field type in `State` struct within `lib/vu_state.go` from `*logrus.Logger` to `logrus.FieldLogger`
1.3: Adds a `NewLogHook` function in `lib/testutils/logrus_hook.go` that accepts variadic `logrus.Level` arguments and returns a `*SimpleLogrusHook`, defaulting to all levels when none are provided
1.4: Adds a `Reset` method on `SimpleLogrusHook` in `lib/testutils/logrus_hook.go` that clears captured entries without returning them
1.5: Adds a `LastEntry` method on `SimpleLogrusHook` in `lib/testutils/logrus_hook.go` that returns the most recent captured `*logrus.Entry` or nil if none exist
1.6: Changes the return type of `NewLogger` in `lib/testutils/test_output.go` from `*logrus.Logger` to `logrus.FieldLogger`

1.7: Adds a `NewLoggerWithHook` function in `lib/testutils/test_output.go` that accepts `t testing.TB` and variadic `logrus.Level` arguments, returning both a `logrus.FieldLogger` and a `*SimpleLogrusHook`
1.8: Changes the `logger` parameter of `ParseArg` in `output/csv/config.go` from `*logrus.Logger` to `logrus.FieldLogger`
1.9: Changes the `logger` parameter of `GetConsolidatedConfig` in `output/csv/config.go` from `*logrus.Logger` to `logrus.FieldLogger`

1.10: Replaces the direct `r.preInitState.Logger.Formatter` access in `Runner.SetOptions` in `js/runner.go` with a type assertion that extracts the `logrus.Formatter` through the `logrus.FieldLogger` interface
1.11: Changes the `loadSystemCertPool` function parameter in `cmd/test_load.go` from `*logrus.Logger` to `logrus.FieldLogger`
1.12: Adds a linter rule in `.golangci.yml` that flags direct usage of the concrete `logrus.Logger` type to prevent regressions
1.13: Removes the `NewMemLogger` function from `lib/testutils/logrus_hook.go` that returned `(*logrus.Logger, *SimpleLogrusHook)` with a concrete logger type
1.14: Removes the TODO comment from `lib/test_state.go` that references replacing the Logger type with an interface
1.15: Removes the TODO comment from `lib/vu_state.go` that references changing the Logger type to an interface
4.1: Removes or changes the signatures of existing `SimpleLogrusHook` methods `Levels`, `Fire`, `Drain`, or `Lines` in `lib/testutils/logrus_hook.go`
4.2: Modifies any existing Go test file (`*_test.go`) as part of the refactoring
